description: WebCrypto crypto.subtle.* detection (a gap competitors don't cover). Host detection spans the global crypto, globalThis.crypto, and node:crypto webcrypto. Severity is operation-aware: RSA always high; EC keygen medium (generatekey.mjs) but confirmed usage high (usage.mjs). FP guards: a local crypto object, and symmetric/hash algs (AES/HMAC/SHA).
